The '''Holt Cross''' was one of the highest honors bestowed on [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]]. It was named after the [[Holt family]], who lived in the [[Sirpar Hills]] for nearly seven [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]], serving continuously in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] and later the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].
